title: Quixel Bridge
description: Quixel Bridge for UE5 opens up as a tab right within the engine, giving you unlimited access to thousands of Megascans available for you to drag and drop straight into your Unreal Engine projects.

Quixel Bridge comes pre-installed with early access release of Unreal Engine 5. To open it up, simply select Quixel Bridge via the Content dropdown in the toolbar, or from the Content Browser.


Bridge for Unreal Engine works with your Epic Games account and currently supports the Unreal Unlimited plan. You can log in using your existing account, or sign up for a new one for free, unlimited access to the Megascans library.

Direct drag and drop: Just drag and drop an asset from the Bridge panel into your scene and a preview mesh will appear instantly. You can place, scale, rotate, and instance it to your liking. The high-res asset will download in the background, and replace the preview mesh automatically.


Built and calibrated for Unreal Engine: The entire Megascans library is optimized to work flawlessly with Unreal Engine 5. Assets are now channel packed, compressed with optimal settings, and LODed with Unreal Engine tools.


Nanite ready: Each Megascans asset is optimized to work with the Nanite system in Unreal Engine. That means you can now add photorealistic, film-quality assets directly into your project without hurting its performance.


Supported Development Platforms: Windows, Mac and Linux

Documentation: Quixel Bridge for UE5
